actionUnits.condition: MonoBehaviour (fileID 764083142, guid 077cb2d6a53b18f4ea7d76e72138fc77) matches the provided AttachToElevator script on GameObject 'platform2 (1)'. The script only exposes Unity messages OnTriggerEnter(Collider) and OnTriggerExit(Collider) and no public no-arg methods. Therefore, no manual Trigger calls are available. Also, OnTrigger* cannot be fired automatically because this object is not a trigger and neither collider in the interaction is guaranteed to have a Rigidbody. To test and cover: we need either (a) BoxCollider.m_IsTrigger=1 and a Rigidbody on one of the interacting objects plus a valid 'player' reference, or (b) a public no-arg test hook method to invoke, or (c) fix the comparison to other.gameObject == player.
